theorem_statement: For smooth finite-energy axisymmetric Navier-Stokes initial data with swirl, z-reflection symmetry, Sobolev regularity H^s for s >= 3, and bounded Gamma/circulation input, the symmetric Hou-Luo route has finite BKM integral on every finite time interval and therefore admits a unique global smooth solution within that symmetric class.
